project-oneliner: Biomechanical analysis of therapeutic exercises using computer vision, 3D digital twin and FEA stress visualization — 100% in your browser
project-description: Upload a video of a bicep curl and get 8 clinical metrics with automatic evaluation, adaptive rep detection, real-time skeleton overlay, a full-body 3D digital twin (Three.js), an FEA-style arm segment stress viewer with jet colormap, interactive time-series and per-rep charts, methodology documentation with LaTeX formulas, and session history. Powered by MediaPipe Pose Landmarker (WASM), React 18, Three.js, Recharts, and KaTeX. No servers, no API keys — everything runs 100% client-side in the browser.
